<!-- Composa UI keeps a documented contribution trail. Explain not just what changed, but why. -->

## What

<!-- The change in one or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The design rationale. If this changes a component's API, states, or Figma mapping, say what problem it solves. -->

## Figma alignment

<!-- If this touches a component, note how its props/states/variants map to the Figma source. Skip if not applicable. -->

## Screenshots / Storybook

<!-- Before / after, or a link to the relevant Storybook story. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Storybook story added or updated for any new variant or state
- [ ] No Figma-proprietary assets bundled (icons pass through as slots)
